title: SCP045 origins modpack
description: just a fun origin modpack for me and my friends. it comes with some cool dungeons and structures, well also adding some new tools armor and weapons. and you can use shaders too.
body:
This is a fun origin modpack i made for my friends and me. if you want to play it too then go ahead and enjoy.

well this was made for just me and some friends. this was aimed to be a Adventure and survival modpack. well also having a lot of new features. and it have some mods like Sodium and Indium to help with getting rid of some lag to help make sure that lowerend PCS play on it too 

Here is a fun list of some features included in this modpack.

you can pick from a list of 100+ origins along with classes and a Aspect                  
you can find some really cool structures like a better Stronghold and some new Villages and more!       
get some new early and late game armor and weapons!.    
explore the new Nether, and end, dimensions!   
you can collect 25+ new rings that have a lot of new effects!


![me at my base](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09df946da6df07ee386b3b1f0b63e7385470c8e.png)
